barRaise.topFinding: Seventh consecutive needs-attention, and the single HIGH is unchanged from 06-20: the .git/index.lock blocker was not cleared. The same zero-byte lock dated Jun 19 20:04 is still in place, no live git process holds it (confirmed dead orphan), HEAD still sits at 5b96058 (Jun 15), and the same three doc edits (CHANGELOG.md, CLAUDE.md, docs/DESIGN.md) remain uncommitted. The 06-20 recommendation to run `cd X:\YesAndBudget; .\scriptselease.ps1 -Bump none` is correct and still applies; it was simply not run. That one guarded command clears the dead lock through Assert-GitSafe and lands the pending edits plus the backed-up reports in a single commit. Do not hand-delete the lock; the Jun 19 hand-clear proved a bare delete does not hold. The code stays healthy for the seventh straight cycle: zero HIGH on the app path, 22 test files, version pills aligned at 0.13.2. The stall clock is now the live risk: last real commit was Jun 15. One HIGH, four MEDIUM.

actions.title: Run `cd X:\YesAndBudget; .\scriptselease.ps1 -Bump none` to clear the dead .git/index.lock via Assert-GitSafe and land the pending doc edits plus reports; do not hand-delete the lock. Then add the index.lock/git-guard hazard entry to CLAUDE.md.
After the ship, prune the five committed-ready YaB rows and the done yab-tracked-bak-rm-2026-06-10, then escalate or close the 15-day yab-barraise-closeout-2026-06-06.
Confirm the canonical-audit run writes and commits its audit block into status/data/Budget.json; it is seven cycles stale (still CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-06-14.md).
Action the P2 keytar migration before at-rest encryption goes from opt-in to default.
From an authed machine, confirm the old .finances SHAs (44b7b10, f670d17, 43ea16b) and the tree 404 on github.com, then retire the finding.
